title: Cyclosorus arfakianus
taxonomy: Cyclosorus arfakianus is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It is native to New Guinea, and its classification is as follows: the genus Cyclosorus is often placed within the genus Cyclosorus in the subfamily Thelypteridoideae, within the family Thelypteridaceae, in the order Polypodiales, in the class Polypodiopsida, and in the division Pteridophyta. The order Polypodiales is a group of ferns that are commonly known as polypods. The family Thelypteridaceae is a group of ferns that are commonly known as the marsh ferns. The division Pteridophyta is a group of vascular plants that are commonly known as ferns.

This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to the treatment of various health issues, such as fever, headaches, and skin conditions.
